description: Hand-authored: points-to JavaScript patterns (for-of, Set, Array.from, spread). Each pattern lives in its own file. Previously jelly-micro/more1 — moved here because these are hand-authored, not from Jelly's micro-test corpus.

edges.notes: cb() inside for-of over [forOf1, forOf2] — pts resolves cb to each array element
cb() inside for-of over [forOf1, forOf2] — pts resolves cb to each array element
cb() inside for-of over new Set([setFn1, setFn2]) — pts resolves cb through Set construction
cb() inside for-of over new Set([setFn1, setFn2]) — pts resolves cb through Set construction
Array.from(arr, mapCallback) — direct reference to mapCallback as the mapping function
item() inside mapCallback — Array.from([arrFn1, arrFn2], mapCallback) passes arrFn1/arrFn2 as item
item() inside mapCallback — Array.from([arrFn1, arrFn2], mapCallback) passes arrFn1/arrFn2 as item
consumer1(...batch1) — direct spread call to consumer1
x() inside consumer1 — spread consumer1(...[sprFn1, sprFn2]) binds sprFn1 to x
y() inside consumer1 — spread consumer1(...[sprFn1, sprFn2]) binds sprFn2 to y
consumer2(...batch2) — direct spread call to consumer2
x() inside consumer2 — spread consumer2(...[sprFn3, sprFn4]) binds sprFn3 to x
y() inside consumer2 — spread consumer2(...[sprFn3, sprFn4]) binds sprFn4 to y
